---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case.

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Include examples if possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Platform

Does this apply to:
- [ ] Claude Cowork
- [ ] OpenClaw
- [ ] Generic (other agents)
- [ ] All platforms
- [ ] Scripts only

## Additional Context

Any other information, mockups, or references.
